item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
nutritious
wait what
and?
almost as if these places were named long ago
no weapons
that's unsettling
please
it's nice that there are only 3 types
hi bob
my dudes
what could go wrong?
sure why not
endless entertainment
dangit Superman
obviously
thanks T
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Thursday unhinged meme dump of pure chaos #259
item.description:
1. Yes, Mr. Anderson... COME with us
2. An average day in the life of a plumber
3. Thanks bro
4. Winding her up
5. He thought he could just smile and wag tail and get away with it... Narrator: He did.
6. Do Mortal Kombat and backpipes mix? You be the judge
7. Twerky twerky little frog
8. I'm really curious what he did at the job interview to prove he can do this job
9. How to hold gun in Italy
10. A magnificent shark
11. This messed me up for a sec
12. Futuristic chariot
13
14. Me, when I hear there is more pizza
15. Would you eat some nihilist pancakes? P.S. Thanks to the two people (Hi, Mom and Dad!) who made it to the end of this dump. When I'm not busy making questionable life choices on the internet, I've been pouring my soul into a little passion project. If you got a kick out of this dump, you're going to love my game: "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)." Think "The Stanley Parable" but with even more chaos and quirky characters such this little nihilist pancake. Can you imagine? A first-person game mixed with humor? Anyway, please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ It would mean the world to me and my brother if you checked out the game and gave it a wishlist. Anyway, that's all for now. Have a great Thursday. If work sucks, refer back to this dump and Imgur
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Images of Note: Morbidly yours
item.description:
owo
Michael Jackson just finds out there's a new playground.
HE THICC
He wanted to go surfing, but the sea is flat calm.
owo
Disney everyone, they'll make a fi;m nobody wants and cancel shows everyone wants/
Oh no.
I mean this how people saw medieval England in Medieval times.
Mary Shelly. Seriously go look it up.
I tried linux, went back to Windows, transitioned, then went back to Linux.
That's the plan
They have so many feelings and demand you feel the same way or die.
this is by design
and when you read that passage they call you a heritic and cite Paul, because Paul means more to them than Jesus.
yes it would be very funny.
ok now I wanna listen to that
NOOT NOOT
:o
oh no
not gonna lie, that is a good song to kill people to.
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Car engine won’t turn over? How to fix?
item.dc:creator: tampacl

item.title: I surprised my husband with a meal for the first time since I became disabled 18 months ago.
item.description:
Martin hung out with me while I was working. He helped me pick up the things that inevitably fell off my lap. He's a professional.
I've had to learn how to carry things on my lap (still dropped everything), utilizing the oven without burning myself (I did anyways), working on my lap instead of a counter. This meal took me all day to make because of how many breaks I took. I'm so dang proud of myself.
item.dc:creator: itslikeavanthatsslowandbig

item.title: I did it
item.description: I bought a 16oz spring mix 11 days ago, but I finished it instead of just letting it rot in the fridge, (& I live alone) the weird part is I just ate hand fulls of it while making dinner each night.
